source_pr.title: *: cleanup usage of testutil.RowsWithSep
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #32858 

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_type_change_test.go, ddl/db_integration_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/modify_column_test.go, ddl/partition_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/table_test.go, expression/integration_serial_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go, infoschema/tables_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go
